name: Dr. Seetharam Kumar
bio: With over a decade in clinical practice, Dr. Seetharam leads implant, periodontal and smile-design work at Cosmedent. He believes in imaging-led diagnostics, transparent treatment plans and taking the time to explain every option.

name: Dr. DV Suneetha
bio: Dr. Suneetha leads restorative and family care at the clinic. Known for her calm, patient-first approach, she handles everything from routine care to root canal therapy and paediatric visits with equal attentiveness.
